value.description: A contagious neurological blood-borne disease spread by close contact with infected bodily fluids, contaminated blood, tainted food, and RimJobWorld adult close-contact events when the RJW bridge is enabled. When RimJobWorld is installed and its bridge is enabled, infected adult pawns have a 75% chance to start valid RJW forced enemy-intercourse jobs with adult humanlike targets before falling back to normal aggression. The virus usually overwhelms a victim quickly. A very small number of survivors develop lasting immune resistance; most terminal cases either transform into Marked Men or die from viral collapse.
